entries.raw_en:
ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryAtmospherics = atmospheric technician jumpsuit
    .desc = I am at work. I can't leave work. Work is breathing. I am testing air quality.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryEngineering = engineering jumpsuit
    .desc = If this suit was non-conductive, maybe engineers would actually do their damn job.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryEngineeringChief = chief engineer's jumpsuit
    .desc = It's a high visibility jumpsuit given to those engineers insane enough to achieve the rank of Chief Engineer.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitarySalvageSpecialist = salvage specialist's jumpsuit
    .desc = It's a snappy jumpsuit with a sturdy set of overalls. It's very dirty.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryCargo = cargo tech jumpsuit
    .desc = A sturdy jumpsuit, issued to members of the Cargo department.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryQM = quartermaster's jumpsuit
    .desc = What can brown do for you?

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryParamedic = paramedic jumpsuit
    .desc = It's got a plus on it, that's a good thing right?

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryMedicalDoctor = medical doctor jumpsuit
    .desc = It's made of a special fiber that provides minor protection against biohazards. It has a cross on the chest denoting that the wearer is trained medical personnel.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryCMO = chief medical officer's jumpsuit
    .desc = It's a jumpsuit worn by those with the experience to be Chief Medical Officer. It provides minor biological protection.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryChemistry = chemistry jumpsuit
    .desc = There's some odd stains on this jumpsuit. Hm.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryVirology = virology jumpsuit
    .desc = It's made of a special fiber that gives special protection against biohazards. It has a virologist rank stripe on it.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryGenetics = genetics jumpsuit
    .desc = It's made of a special fiber that gives special protection against biohazards. It has a geneticist rank stripe on it.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryScientist = scientist jumpsuit
    .desc = It's made of a special fiber that increases perceived intelligence and decreases personal ethics. It has markings that denote the wearer as a scientist.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryResearchDirector = research director's turtleneck
    .desc = It's a jumpsuit worn by those with the know-how to achieve the position of Research Director. Its fabric provides minor protection from biological contaminants.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryHydroponics = hydroponics jumpsuit
    .desc = Has a strong earthy smell to it. Hopefully it's merely dirty as opposed to soiled.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryTurtleneckMercenary = mercenary jumpsuit
    .desc = Clothing for real mercenaries who have gone through fire, water and the jungle of planets flooded with dangerous monsters or targets for which a reward has been assigned.

ent-ClothingUniformJumpsuitMilitaryTurtleneckBlueMercenary = mercenary jumpsuit
    .desc = Clothing for real mercenaries who have gone through fire, water and the jungle of planets flooded with dangerous monsters or targets for which a reward has been assigned.

ent-DrinkGinAndSonic = metamorphic glass
    .desc = A metamorphic glass that automagically turns into a glass appropriate for the drink within. There's a sanded off patent number on the bottom.

    .desc = A metamorphic glass that automagically turns into a glass appropriate for the drink within. There's a sanded off patent number on the bottom.

    .desc = A metamorphic glass that automagically turns into a glass appropriate for the drink within. There's a sanded off patent number on the bottom.
